design_status.note: When waiting_for_signoff is true, SD takes no design actions until reflection_signoff arrives. This is a hard stop.

subsystems.note: One entry per subsystem as design progresses. Add when first analysis is received.
subsystems.name: string
subsystems.spec_path: string — file path to spec document
subsystems.spec_status: string — enum: not_started | reflection_pending | signoff_pending | released | under_correction
subsystems.reflection_id: string — message_id of the design_reflection sent for this subsystem
subsystems.signoff_id: string — message_id of the reflection_signoff received
subsystems.release_id: string — message_id of the spec_release sent
